message:
test(command): add adversarial edge case tests for Redis parity

6 new tests covering tricky Redis edge cases:
- SET EX 0: correctly rejected with invalid expire error
- EXPIRE 0: correctly deletes the key immediately
- LPOP with count 0: returns empty array (not error)
- GETRANGE with negative indices: returns correct last character
- SETRANGE with empty string: returns existing length unchanged
- OBJECT ENCODING on non-existent key: returns error (not nil)

All 6 tests pass, confirming these edge cases are handled correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
